headline: Stop gaining weight, start losing today
summary: You're currently gaining when you need -0.72kg weekly; today builds the deficit that changes your June outcome.
details: Today: stick to portioned Huel meals with zero snacking—no emotional eating on a Tuesday when discipline matters most. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes to create caloric deficit. This matters because you have 33kg to lose in 320 days; every disciplined day compounds toward your 88kg target.
